reasoning_summary: Orchestration setup complete and proven: bundle validated, git repo initialized, GLM-5.2 as control plane, MiniMax-M3 driven via API-to-API supervisor adapter (Mode B). Adapter sandbox smoke (4 runs) proved model pinning, path/command policy enforcement, schema validation with self-repair, telemetry, secret redaction, tamper detection, crash recovery. Real-repo pilot P00-T01 ran through M3: GDD V5 frozen correctly (sha256 f550bdf3..., byteSize 232607), publisher confirmation correctly left pending (no fabrication), draft validator PASS with 0 errors, 0 open source markers. M3 exhausted the round budget before self-finalizing, so its report is supervisor-synthesized; GLM completion-reviewed the actual artifacts against acceptance criteria. The orchestration loop works end-to-end on the real repo. Limitation 1: G00 cannot PASS until publisher confirmation is provided (declared gap, not a defect). Limitation 2: 87 chapter headings remain requires_review (P00-T01 debt to clear in a follow-up dispatch). Limitation 3: M3 self-finalization within round budget is variable; mitigated by finalization nudge, supervisor-synthesized reports, and GLM artifact review.
